steps.title: Join two independent clauses
steps.content: Okinaka does not make such decisions single-handedly is a complete clause. All historical designations must be approved by a group of experts is also a complete clause.

steps.title: Choose valid punctuation
steps.content: A lacks the comma needed before and when joining independent clauses. B creates a comma splice. C fuses the clauses with no punctuation. A semicolon correctly joins the two closely related independent clauses. The answer is D.
